llm_context.content: Imagine you are helping software test engineers to create comprehensive test plans without delving i...

actionUnits.condition: Manual test of ToggleParticle MonoBehaviour on Particle_Flame. Scene MonoBehaviour (script_fileID 5377429380903153772, guid ad0a2892d8b703341afc39a5cf89bef8) matches provided ToggleParticle script. ParticleSystem playOnAwake is false per scene and OnValidate. Call Play() to start particle playback.
After Play(), call Stop() to cease particle playback.
Call ToggleParticleSystem() to toggle from stopped to playing.
Call ToggleParticleSystem() again to toggle from playing to stopped, validating both branches of the toggle.
